articles.title: Belgium embarrasses Team USA before breaking out Trump's signature dance celebration after fourth goal - Fox News
articles.description: Romelu Lukaku hit the Trump dance after scoring Belgium's fourth goal against Team USA, clowning the Americans on their own soil in a 4-1 knockout loss.
articles.content:
Well, that was a brutal ending.
Team USA's World Cup run came to an emphatic close Monday night in a 4-1 loss to Belgium. But the lasting image wasn't the scoreline. It was Romelu Lukaku breaking ou… [+1982 chars]
